summary: P117 dry-run bridge plan — flag disabled. 6 approved P109 mappings loaded. Baseline project-mapping blocked: 316; bridge unlocked: 6 (when flag on). 6 candidate(s) bridge-applied in direct proof pass. GO: Default runner unchanged when flag off; bridge safe for dry-run only.
goNoGoReason: Bridge integration is dry-run only, flag-gated, and preserves default runner behavior when disabled.

constraints: Only active when env is exactly true
Only applies when engine mode is dryRun
Never applies for executeOne or executeSafeSingles

callSiteTrace.notes: Orchestrates ingestion sync, candidate selection, and P106 engine per cycle.
dryRun returns report only; executeOne calls controlled-live-send after auto-repair.
Primary production classification loop per candidate. P117 bridge hooks here when flag enabled.
Ordered protection gates then closed-ad mapping inside classifier.
Title/city/state heuristic; does not read P109 store today.

integrationDesign.gapFromP116: P109 approved mappings affect P110/P111–P115 dry-run overlays but not classifyPaperworkBlocker in the runner path.
integrationDesign.approach: Optional P117 bridge wraps classifyPaperworkBlocker with P110 overlay jobs when USE_APPROVED_MAPPING_BRIDGE_DRY_RUN=true and engine mode is dryRun only.
integrationDesign.insertionPoint: buildAutonomousPaperworkReport candidate loop — swap classifier call when bridge active; default path unchanged.
integrationDesign.protectionOrder: already_sent, invalid_email, duplicate_risk evaluated in baseline before bridge overlay; protectionBlockerOverridesApproval prevents bridge unlock.
integrationDesign.futureLivePath: After dry-run validation, introduce separate USE_APPROVED_MAPPING_BRIDGE_LIVE flag with P101/P100 gate requirements — out of P117 scope.

warnings: P117 — dry-run bridge plan only; no live runner wiring.
